artifact.missing: This content has not been created or the file is missing. Use /opsx:continue to generate the artifact, or open the change directory in editor.
artifact.missingShort: This content has not been created or the file is missing.
artifact.readError: Failed to read file. Check permissions or encoding.
task.empty: No task items found. Ensure tasks.md has - [ ] / - [x] format lines.
task.warnPrompt:
These tasks are not yet complete. Continue anyway?
{list}{more}
task.noAdapter: No executor available. Install Cursor or use the Clipboard adapter.
archive.readOnlyLabel: This change is archived, view only
clipboard.copiedChat: Copied to clipboard. Paste into Chat input.
clipboard.copiedGeneral: Copied to clipboard. Paste into Chat or terminal.
clipboard.copiedCursorChat: Copied to clipboard. Chat opened — paste and send.
command.enterName: Enter change name (Press 'Enter' to confirm or 'Escape' to cancel)
command.nameFormat: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
command.copiedContinue: Copied command. Paste into AI chat to generate {artifact}
command.copiedContinueGeneric: Copied /opsx:continue. Paste into AI chat to generate artifact
command.promptProposal: Please create the Proposal artifact (change proposal document)
command.promptSpecs: Please create the Specs artifacts (spec documents based on Proposal)
command.promptDesign: Please create the Design artifact (technical design based on Proposal)
command.promptTasks: Please create the Tasks artifact (implementation task list based on Specs and Design)
verify.description: /opsx:verify validates implementation against artifacts across three dimensions:
verify.completeness: Completeness: All tasks done, all requirements have corresponding code
verify.correctness: Correctness: Implementation matches spec intent, edge cases handled
verify.coherence: Coherence: Design decisions reflected in code, naming conventions consistent
verify.notInAllowlist: Command not in Verify allowlist. Only predefined debug commands are allowed.
dashboard.loadFailed: Failed to load data. Try refreshing.
dashboard.emptyChanges: No active changes. Create one to get started.
dashboard.emptySpecs: No specs defined for this workspace.
spec.label: Spec:
